nonGoals: Do not change the chunk-packing loop or algorithm
Do not change any function signatures or exports
Do not touch prepareForSynthesis or any other caller
Do not add or modify tests in this deliverable
objective: Fix the sentence-segmentation regex in chunkText to capture consecutive punctuation runs (..., ?!, !!!, . . .) so no characters are silently dropped.
planText: Modify the sentence-boundary regex in `chunkText` (line 69 of `apps/web/src/lib/chunk-text.ts`) so that the trailing delimiter capture uses `[.!?]+` (one or more) instead of `[.!?]` (exactly one), and ensure segments consisting solely of delimiters/spaces are not skipped. This restores the exact-reconstruction guarantee by assigning every character of the trimmed input to exactly one segment. The chunk-packing loop, function signatures, and all other files remain untouched.

nonGoals: Do not modify chunk-text.ts implementation in this deliverable
Do not add tests for unrelated chunkText behavior
Do not touch other test files or test infrastructure
objective: Add regression tests validating the punctuation-run fix, the exact-reconstruction property, and hard-split edge cases.
planText: Add regression test cases to `apps/web/src/lib/chunk-text.test.ts` covering: (a) the three issue reproductions — `chunkText('Wait... what?', 8)`, `chunkText('Really?! No way.', 9)`, `chunkText('End. . . done.', 6)`; (b) a property-based test asserting `chunks.join('') === input.trim()` for a range of punctuation-heavy inputs; (c) a hard-split interaction test where a punctuation run straddles a maxLength boundary. Run `npm run test` to confirm all tests pass.
